action.description: May AP release an invoice after a duplicate-payment alert?

context.action_boundary: May AP release an invoice after a duplicate-payment alert?
context.anomaly_observed: The packet includes a duplicate invoice alert; reversal evidence must match original invoice, amount, vendor, and ledger status.
context.explanation_summary: REV-SAB-038 exactly voids the duplicate prior invoice.

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-SAB-2026-038 requests USD 37,500 for Sable Credit Services.
Duplicate-payment alert references prior invoice INV-SAB-2026-014 for USD 37,500.
Reversal record REV-SAB-038 voids prior invoice INV-SAB-2026-014 for Sable Credit Services, USD 37,500, posted in ledger before release.

policy_documents.content: Duplicate alert is closed only when reversal or credit evidence matches vendor, original invoice, amount, and posted ledger status before release.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
